series_metadata.series_title: Public Assistance/ Medicaid Refunds and Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Records document requests from county Child Support Enforcement Agency(CSEA's) for Child Support cases which require a Public Assistance or Medicaid Refund through Payment Analysis Team B. Files include, but are not limited to, PA/Medicaid Refund Request forms housed within the "FC_MC_Requests"(name of email account), PA/Medicaid Access Database information which stores all requests submitted.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office child support case is closed. ; Paper: in office child support case is closed
